  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Unshielded rubber coupling staged/installed for underground use instead of a code-compliant shielded transition coupling."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the unshielded rubber coupling.",
    "Procure and install a heavy-duty shielded transition coupling rated for underground burial and the specific pipe materials."
  ],
  "rationale": "Unshielded flexible rubber couplings lack the shear resistance required for underground burial. Soil settlement and external loads can cause pipe misalignment, shear failure, or collapse at the joint. Code requires shielded transition couplings (e.g., ASTM C1460 or ASTM C1173 compliant) to maintain structural alignment underground.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 705 (Joints and Connections)",
    "ASTM C1173",
    "ASTM C1460"
  ]
}
